text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity here. The first scene, with its clean glass walls and empty meeting room, fills me with the quiet possibility of conversation, collaboration, or perhaps solitude. In the second scene, the vivid exhibition about research and development stimulates my intellect and wonder. The fusion of art, language, and technology on the wall inspires me to contemplate the relationship between humans and machines, and my own place as an observer in this ever-evolving space of ideas.
